---
title: "Birnbaum-Saunders Reparametrizada"
output: html_document
---

Código reproduzido dos autores:

LEÃO, Jeremias; LEIVA, Víctor; SAULO, Helton; TOMAZELLA, Vera. A survival model with Birnbaum–Saunders frailty for uncensored and censored cancer data. Brazilian Journal of Probability and Statistics, v. 32, n. 4, p. 707–729, 2018. DOI: 10.1214/17-BJPS360.

```{r}

install.packages(
  "https://cran.r-project.org/src/contrib/Archive/gbs/gbs_1.0.tar.gz",
  repos = NULL,
  type = "source"
)
```

```{r}

library(MASS)
library(survival)
library(gbs)
library(stats)
library(stats4)
library(boot)
library(locfit)
library(flexsurv)
library(numDeriv)
library(lattice)
library(HSAUR)

```

```{r}


##################################################################
##################################################################
# Estimation of parameters in BS Frailty model
# with Exponential baseline distribution
##################################################################
##################################################################

##################################################################
## Unconditional Survival Function of the BS frailty model
##################################################################

uncsurv_BS <- function(t,delta,lambda){
  st <- (exp( (delta/2)*( 1 - sqrt((delta+4*lambda*t+1)/(delta+1)) ) )*(sqrt(delta+1) + sqrt((delta+4*lambda*t+1)) ))/(2*sqrt(delta+4*lambda*t+1))
  
  return(st)
}
```

```{r}

##################################################################
## Unconditional Hazard Function of the BS frailty model
##################################################################

unchazd_BS <- function(t,delta,lambda){
  
  ht <- lambda*( delta*( delta + sqrt( (delta+1)*(delta+4*lambda*t+1) ) + 4*lambda*t + 3 ) + 2 )/( (delta+4*lambda*t+1)*( delta + sqrt( (delta+1)*(delta+4*lambda*t+1) ) + 1) )
  
  return(ht)
  
}
```

```{r}

##################################################################
## Log Likelihood Function of BS Frailty Model (Exp - baseline)
##################################################################

log.lik_BS <- function(par,x,cens){
  
  delta   <- par[1]
  lambda  <- par[2]
  
  loglik <- sum( cens*log( unchazd_BS(t=x,delta=delta,lambda=lambda) ) ) + sum( log( uncsurv_BS(t=x,delta=delta,lambda=lambda) ) )
  
  return (-loglik)
}

log.lik_BSHE <- function(par,y,cens){
  
  delta   <- par[1]
  lambda  <- par[2]
  
  loglik <- sum( cens*log( unchazd_BS(t=y,delta=delta,lambda=lambda) ) ) + sum( log( uncsurv_BS(t=y,delta=delta,lambda=lambda) ) )
  
  return (loglik)
}

```

```{r}

##################################################################
##################################################################
# Estimation of parameters in BS Frailty model
# with Weibull baseline distribution
##################################################################
##################################################################

##################################################################
# # Cumulative Hazard Rate baseline - Weibull
##################################################################

CHR_base <- function(t,alpha,eta){
  
  chr <- (t/alpha)^eta
  
  return(chr)
}
```

```{r}

##################################################################
# Hazard Rate baseline - Weibull
##################################################################

HR_base <- function(t,alpha,eta){
  
  hr <- (eta*(t^(eta-1)))/(alpha^eta)
  return(hr)
}
```

```{r}

##################################################################
# Unconditional survival
# function of BS frailty
##################################################################

unc_sf <- function(t,alpha,eta,delta){
  
  a <- sqrt(delta+4*CHR_base(t,alpha,eta)+1)
  b <- (delta/2)*(1 - (a/sqrt(delta+1)) )
  c <- a + sqrt(delta + 1)
  
  usf <- (exp(b)*c)/(2*a)
  
  return(usf)
  
}
```

```{r}

###################################
# Unconditional hazard
# rate of BS frailty
###################################

unc_hz <- function(t,alpha,eta,delta){
  
  a <- delta*(delta + sqrt( (delta+4*CHR_base(t,alpha,eta)+1)*(delta+1) ) + 4*CHR_base(t,alpha,eta) + 3) + 2
  b <- (delta + sqrt( (delta+4*CHR_base(t,alpha,eta)+1)*(delta+1) ) + 1)
  
  uhr <- ( (HR_base(t,alpha,eta))*a )/ ( (delta+4*CHR_base(t,alpha,eta)+1)*b )
  
  return(uhr)
  
}
```

```{r}

####################################################
# Log Likelihood Function of BS Frailty Model
####################################################

log.lik_BS_weibull <- function(par,x,cens){
  
  alpha  <- par[1]
  eta    <- par[2]
  delta  <- par[3]
  
  
  loglik <- sum( log( unc_sf(t=x,alpha=alpha,eta=eta,delta=delta) ) ) + sum( cens*log( unc_hz(t=x,alpha=alpha,eta=eta,delta=delta) ) )
  
  return (-loglik)
}

log.lik_BS_weibullHE <- function(par,y,cens){
  
  alpha  <- par[1]
  eta    <- par[2]
  delta  <- par[3]
  
  
  loglik <- sum( log( unc_sf(t=y,alpha=alpha,eta=eta,delta=delta) ) ) + sum( cens*log( unc_hz(t=y,alpha=alpha,eta=eta,delta=delta) ) )
  
  return (loglik)
}
```

```{r}

##################################################################
##################################################################


##################################################################
# Unconditional survival
# function of BS frailty - Log-Normal
##################################################################

unc_sf_logn <- function(t,delta,pmu,psig){
  
  a <- sqrt(delta+4*Hlnorm(t, meanlog=pmu, sdlog=psig, log=FALSE)+1)
  b <- (delta/2)*(1 - (a/sqrt(delta+1)) )
  c <- a + sqrt(delta + 1)
  
  usf <- (exp(b)*c)/(2*a)
  
  return(usf)
  
}
```

```{r}

##################################################################
# Unconditional hazard
# rate of BS frailty
##################################################################

unc_hz_logn <- function(t,delta,pmu,psig){
  
  a <- delta*(delta + sqrt( (delta+4*Hlnorm(x=t, meanlog=pmu, sdlog=psig, log=FALSE)+1)*(delta+1) ) + 4*Hlnorm(x=t, meanlog=pmu, sdlog=psig, log=FALSE) + 3) + 2
  b <- (delta + sqrt( (delta+4*Hlnorm(x=t, meanlog=pmu, sdlog=psig, log=FALSE)+1)*(delta+1) ) + 1)
  
  uhr <- ( (hlnorm(x=t, meanlog=pmu, sdlog=psig, log=FALSE))*a )/ ( (delta+4*Hlnorm(x=t, meanlog=pmu, sdlog=psig, log=FALSE)+1)*b )
  
  return(uhr)
  
}
```

```{r}


####################################################
# Log Likelihood Function of BS Frailty Model
####################################################

log.lik_BS_logn <- function(par,x,cens){
  
  delta  <- par[1]
  pmu    <- par[2]
  psig   <- par[3]
  
  
  loglik <- sum( log( unc_sf_logn(t=x,delta=delta,pmu=pmu,psig=psig) ) ) + sum( cens*log( unc_hz_logn(t=x,delta=delta,pmu=pmu,psig=psig) ) )
  
  return (-loglik)
}

log.lik_BS_lognHLN <- function(par,y,cens){
  
  alpha  <- par[1]
  eta    <- par[2]
  delta  <- par[3]
  
  
  loglik <- sum( log( unc_sf(t=y,alpha=alpha,eta=eta,delta=delta) ) ) + sum( cens*log( unc_hz(t=y,alpha=alpha,eta=eta,delta=delta) ) )
  
  return (loglik)
}

```

```{r}

## computes TTT plot and Barlow-Proschan's test for censored and uncensored data set
TTTplot <- function(time,cens=NULL)
{
  n <- length(time)
  oo <- order(time)
  if(is.null(cens)) cens = rep(1,n)
  sorttime <- time[oo]
  sortcens <- cens[oo]
  ttt <- numeric(n)
  ttt[1] <- n*sorttime[1]
  for(i in 2:n)
  {
    ttt[i] <- ttt[i-1]+(n-i+1)*(sorttime[i]-sorttime[i-1])
  }
  ttt <- data.frame(time=sorttime,cens = sortcens,
                    rank=1:n,"cum total time"=ttt)
  colnames(ttt) <- c("time","cens","rank","Cum.Total.Time")#,"i/n","TTT")
  
  TTT <- ttt[ttt$cens==1,]
  nfail <- dim(TTT)[1]
  TTT <- cbind(TTT[,-3],TTT$Cum.Total.Time/TTT$Cum.Total.Time[nfail],
               (1:nfail)/nfail)
  colnames(TTT) <- c("time","cens","Cum.Total.Time","TTT","i/n")
  
  
  
  W <- sum(TTT$"Cum.Total.Time"[1:(nfail-1)])/TTT$"Cum.Total.Time"[nfail]
  Z <- (W-(nfail-1)/2)/sqrt((nfail-1)/12)
  print(TTT)
  cat("Barlow-Proschan's test\n")
  cat(paste("W=",round(W,4)," k=",nfail,"\n",sep=""))
  cat(paste("Z=",round(Z,4)," p.value=",round(pnorm(-abs(Z)),4),"\n",sep=""))
  
  postscript("/home/jeremias/Desktop/TTT2.eps",family="Times",width=3.2,height=3.2,paper="a4",pointsize=8)
  par(mar=c(3.9,4.2,1.4,0.5),mgp=c(2.4, 1, 0)) 
  #plot(TTT$"i/n",TTT$TTT,xlab="i/n",ylab="TTT",xlim=c(0,1),
  #     ylim=c(0,1),pch=19, main="TTT plot",sub=paste("N. failure = ",nfail," N. censored = ", n-nfail,sep=""))
  plot(TTT$"i/n",TTT$TTT,xlab="i/n",ylab="tt",xlim=c(0,1),type="l",
       ylim=c(0,1),main="",lwd=2)
  lines(c(0,1),c(0,1),lty=2)
  #    return(list(TTT=TTT,W=W,Z=Z))
  dev.off()
}

```

```{r}

# Reading Data Application 2  

data("cancer",package="survival")

times = veteran$time
status = veteran$status

```

```{r}

TTTplot(time=times,cens=status)
ekm <- survfit(Surv(times,status)~1,conf.int = FALSE)
plot(ekm,xlab="t", ylab="st")

```

```{r}

## 1
# Estimating parameter values of BS frailty Exponential
esti_BS <- mlebs(times)
chuteDelta  <- 2/(esti_BS$alphabsEstimate^2);chuteDelta
chuteLambda <- fitdistr(times,densfun="exponential")
chuteLambda <- as.numeric(chuteLambda$estimate[1]);chuteLambda

# Obtaining the results
est_BS   <- optim(c(chuteDelta,chuteLambda),log.lik_BS,x=times,method="CG",cens=status)
hatdelta  <- est_BS$par[1];hatdelta
hatlambda <- est_BS$par[2];hatlambda

# Estimated frailty variance
vnu1 <-(2*hatdelta+5)/(hatdelta+1)^2;vnu1

# AIC and BIC
aic1_BS <-    -2*(-log.lik_BS(c(hatdelta,hatlambda),times,status)) + 2*2;aic1_BS
bic1_BS <-    -2*(-log.lik_BS(c(hatdelta,hatlambda),times,status)) + 2*log(length(times));bic1_BS

-log.lik_BS(c(hatdelta,hatlambda),times,status)

## SEs  
valueH    <- -hessian(func=log.lik_BSHE,x=c(hatdelta,hatlambda),y=times,cens=status)
Hess      <- solve(valueH)
SE        <- sqrt(diag(Hess))

se.coef = SE
tval = est_BS$par/se.coef
matcoef = cbind(c(est_BS$par), se.coef, tval, 2*(1-pnorm(abs(tval))))
dimnames(matcoef) = list(names(tval), c(" Estimate",
                                        " Std. Error", " t value", "Pr(>|t|)"))
cat("\nCoefficient(s):\n")
printCoefmat(matcoef, digits = 6, signif.stars = TRUE) 
```
